item.title: This is Tom and he’s 7 years old. One day he told his schoolmates that his uncle was Superman. The other kids made fun of him and no one believed him. Then his mother made a call, and she asked her brother-in-law to take him to school one day. And Henry C
item.description: Love the expression on the little dude’s face. He’s positively marching Cavill to that school ? “Pick your feet up, Uncle Henry. We’re going to show these fucks once and for all.”
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: the splints: a crash course.
item.description:
My left hand (obviously). Each one of these keeps my joints from wobbling side-to-side and working themselves out of place, causing chronic pain. They also prevent acute injuries like full dislocations.
The right hand. I have a connective tissue disease, which means the glue holding my body together is failing. All of my joints will dislocate at the drop of a hat, but it's the worst in my hands. Worst hands my specialist has seen! Gold star! I'm genuinely useless without these, I can't even type or use my mouse without hurting myself. And there are still a lot of things I can't do even with the splints, like use a pen for more than a sentence or two. I managed to teach myself how to continue knitting, since I developed a way to do it without needing to grip. I can't do it for long periods, though, so it's a nice little treat, not something I can marathon. They're gonna keep getting worse, though, so at some point -likely sooner rather than later- I'll lose that too. All I can do is my best, but I've taught myself that my best is good enough. I try to look on the bright side. All I've ever wanted to do is write, and between these bad boys and my light keyswitches, I can still type for a few hours at a time. Means I still get to enjoy my passion, at least for now.
item.dc:creator: MisterTeatime

item.title: Images of Note: Unriddle
item.description:
This isn't just a thing with non-natives. My accent was fuckin' weird as a kid.
I'm literally writing a book about the Temperance Act in Scotland.
My cat however just screams at me when he wants out.
Anglish is an amazing thing.
This woman emits a powerful energy.
A baby!
There you are vibing and then suddenly SHARK!
YOU ARE YAOILESS!
ireland and France are going to be on a race-to-Berlin style race to London.
aaaaaaaaaaaaa
The fact this creature is in a Secure Psychiatric Unit means they are a threat to others.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also i'm Streamin': http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Story time
item.description: FP Edit: I'm not American and this still hit me hard. If you are American you need to get vocal. Mass protests in the streets. Write letters. Go on strike. Whatever it takes to make leadership hear you. Tell politicians if the don't care about gun deaths they will not be in office. Lobbyists have the advantage of money, but people have the power of numbers.
item.dc:creator: DCA4242

item.title: Good boy doesn’t know which nugget to eat
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: I’m never going back!
item.description: I lost almost 70 lbs. Started in August 2020 because of the pandemic. Everyone tells me they went the opposite way! Healthy eating and increased exercise, slow and steady, nothing crazy. I wish I could lose the extra 25lbs to reach my final target but it’s been the hardest and I’m kinda stuck. Still feel amazing though! Front page edit: Wow! Thanks gang! I hesitated to post until reaching my goal but all this encouragement may actually help without making me feel the pressure. For those who wanted to know more: - calorie counting with high protein target. Don’t deprive myself completely - still eat out with friends, have occasional sweet treats, and when on vacation/holidays use my weight maintenance calorie target instead of my weight loss calorie target. - went from no exercise to 2 times per week initially then increased until now I exercise 5-7 times per week. Multiple types including swimming, biking, cardio, tennis, and now have a personal trainer for weights for the last 8 months. - my physical and mental health are significantly better. Had PCOS, now resolved. Anxiety is much better. Had not tried dating for years due to low self esteem but have now met someone amazing. Truly living my best life right now! I had struggled with my weight my entire life. This is the lowest weight I’ve had since I was 15 years old. So I believe in every one of you who have been in the same situation! You can do it!
item.dc:creator: DoctorCanada

item.title: My neighbor complained that my front lawn wasn't mowed.
item.description:
I pointed out very politely that we don't live in an HOA, my yard is in compliance with city ordinances, and my yard is so far the only fucking yard one with flowers and plantlife except the one 4 houses down with a retired korean man who gardens like it's his only way to cheat death.
Like seriously. The fucking clover is blooming, I have honey bees everywhere (which is nice since my vegetable garden is now flowering), and it's not ratty looking?
Sure, some thistles or something ruin the meadowscape image, but who cares? At least my front yard doesn't look like a prestamped green tabletop, I can enjoy sitting out front with a drink and just look at the plants.
item.dc:creator: Stoneagedudeman

item.title: Friday meme dump (no politics, just laughs)
item.description:
1. How to work out properly
2
3. It might be a trap
4
5
6. What a you mean I canta have thee garlic?
7. Where gargoyle?
8. Hogwarts logic
9
10
11. Hey baby, let me take you to Poundland
12. New Rhino movie footage just dropped
13. Happi boa
14. Tasty food tax
15. Me when someone appreciates me for me : ) If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. Have a great Friday and awesome weekend and don't forget to hydrate and take care of yourself. Go on a hike if the weather is nice : )
